testcase.name: test_embed_public_url_returns_fastapi_html

failure.message:
AssertionError: Public /embed/<slug> is NOT returning the FastAPI iframe page — ingress is routing /embed/* to the React frontend instead of the backend. FIX: move route to /api/embed/{slug} (request author called this out). assert 'TokenForge savings' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000" />
 <meta name="description" content="TokenForge — Cut your LLM costs by 40-80%. Production-grade prompt distillation engine with 5 optimization pillars." />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@400,700,800,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a
 user's mobile device or desktop. See https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/web-app-manifest/
 -->
 <!--
 Notice the use of in the tags above.
 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.
 O...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a02f3d2f1be864b3',t:'MTc3OTk5MjA2Ng=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:77: in test_embed_public_url_returns_fastapi_html assert "TokenForge savings" in body, ( E AssertionError: Public /embed/<slug> is NOT returning the FastAPI iframe page — ingress is routing /embed/* to the React frontend instead of the backend. FIX: move route to /api/embed/{slug} (request author called this out). E assert 'TokenForge savings' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000" />
 <meta name="description" content="TokenForge — Cut your LLM costs by 40-80%. Production-grade prompt distillation engine with 5 optimization pillars." />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@400,700,800,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a
 user's mobile device or desktop. See https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/web-app-manifest/
 -->
 <!--
 Notice the use of in the tags above.
 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.
 O...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a02f3d2f1be864b3',t:'MTc3OTk5MjA2Ng=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.name: test_embed_contains_live_numbers_and_display_name

failure.message:
assert 'TokenForge Admin' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000" />
 <meta name="description" content="TokenForge — Cut your LLM costs by 40-80%. Production-grade prompt distillation engine with 5 optimization pillars." />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@400,700,800,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a
 user's mobile device or desktop. See https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/web-app-manifest/
 -->
 <!--
 Notice the use of in the tags above.
 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.
 O...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a02f3d30988c8fc2',t:'MTc3OTk5MjA2Ng=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:87: in test_embed_contains_live_numbers_and_display_name assert api_data["display_name"] in body E assert 'TokenForge Admin' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000" />
 <meta name="description" content="TokenForge — Cut your LLM costs by 40-80%. Production-grade prompt distillation engine with 5 optimization pillars." />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@400,700,800,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a
 user's mobile device or desktop. See https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/web-app-manifest/
 -->
 <!--
 Notice the use of in the tags above.
 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.
 O...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a02f3d30988c8fc2',t:'MTc3OTk5MjA2Ng=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.name: test_embed_iframe_headers

failure.message: AssertionError: XFO header missing/wrong: '' assert ('ALLOWALL' in '' or 'ALLOW' in '') + where '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8>() + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8> = ''.upper + and '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8>() + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8> = ''.upper

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:96: in test_embed_iframe_headers assert "ALLOWALL" in xfo.upper() or "ALLOW" in xfo.upper(), f"XFO header missing/wrong: {xfo!r}" E AssertionError: XFO header missing/wrong: '' E assert ('ALLOWALL' in '' or 'ALLOW' in '') E + where '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8>() E + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8> = ''.upper E + and '' = <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8>() E + where <built-in method upper of str object at 0xfb78bef00be8> = ''.upper

testcase.name: test_embed_unknown_slug_returns_404_html
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:101: in test_embed_unknown_slug_returns_404_html assert r.status_code == 404 E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_embed_theme_light_palette

failure.message:
AssertionError: light theme should use white background assert '#FFFFFF' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
 <meta name="theme-color" content="#000000" />
 <meta name="description" content="TokenForge — Cut your LLM costs by 40-80%. Production-grade prompt distillation engine with 5 optimization pillars." />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
 <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
 <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <link href="https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@400,700,800,900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a
 user's mobile device or desktop. See https://developers.google.com/web/fundamentals/web-app-manifest/
 -->
 <!--
 Notice the use of in the tags above.
 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.
 O...les for anonymous users as well,
 session_recording: {
 recordCrossOriginIframes: true,
 capturePerformance: false,
 },
 });
 </script>
 <script>(function(){function c(){var b=a.contentDocument||a.contentWindow.document;if(b){var d=b.createElement('script');d.innerHTML="window.__CF$cv$params={r:'a02f3d32ef1b21a3',t:'MTc3OTk5MjA2Nw=='};var a=document.createElement('script');a.src='/cdn-cgi/challenge-platform/scripts/jsd/main.js';document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);";b.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(d)}}if(document.body){var a=document.createElement('iframe');a.height=1;a.width=1;a.style.position='absolute';a.style.top=0;a.style.left=0;a.style.border='none';a.style.visibility='hidden';document.body.appendChild(a);if('loading'!==document.readyState)c();else if(window.addEventListener)document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',c);else{var e=document.onreadystatechange||function(){};document.onreadystatechange=function(b){e(b);'loading'!==document.readyState&&(document.onreadystatechange=e,c())}}}})();</script></body>
</html>
'

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:111: in test_embed_theme_light_palette assert "#FFFFFF" in body, "light theme should use white background" E AssertionError: light theme should use white background E assert '#FFFFFF' in '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />

 <!--
 manifest.json provides metadata used when your web app is installed on a

 It will be replaced with the URL of the `public` folder during the build.

</html>
'

testcase.name: test_embed_avg_pct_never_exceeds_100

failure.message: AssertionError: avg_pct field not found in embed body (likely served by frontend SPA, not FastAPI) assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tokenforge_iter7_widget.py:121: in test_embed_avg_pct_never_exceeds_100 assert m, f"avg_pct field not found in embed body (likely served by frontend SPA, not FastAPI)" E AssertionError: avg_pct field not found in embed body (likely served by frontend SPA, not FastAPI) E assert None

testcase.name: test_embed_internal_light_palette
